channel.title: Confluent Kafka on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Confluent Kafka on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: [In preview] Public Preview: Confluent Kafka Connector in Azure Logic Apps (Standard)
item.description:
Microsoft announced the public preview of the Confluent Kafka Connector for Azure Logic Apps (Standard), enabling Logic Apps to both send and receive messages with Confluent Kafka, a distributed streaming platform.

  • Source: Azure Updates
